languages.text: {n}Озарение приходит мгновенно — этот меч вы видели на портрете Себериана фон Валанциуса, найденном вами на борту флагмана.{/n}
{n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Озарение приходит мгновенно — этот меч вы видели на портрете Себериана фон Валанциуса, найденном вами на борту флагмана.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}
{n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}
{n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你瞬间意识到，那把剑，就是你在旗舰上那幅塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯画像中见过的那一把。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你瞬间意识到，那把剑，就是你在旗舰上那幅塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯画像中见过的那一把。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une révélation vous frappe aussitôt : cette épée n'est autre que celle que vous avez vue sur le portrait de Seberian von Valancius à bord du vaisseau amiral.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une révélation vous frappe aussitôt : cette épée n'est autre que celle que vous avez vue sur le portrait de Seberian von Valancius à bord du vaisseau amiral.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aydınlanmayla başından vurulmuşa dönüyorsun. Bu; Seberian von Valancius'un portresinde gördüğün, sancak gemisindeki kılıç.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aydınlanmayla başından vurulmuşa dönüyorsun. Bu; Seberian von Valancius'un portresinde gördüğün, sancak gemisindeki kılıç.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te das cuenta al instante de que esa es la espada que viste en el retrato de Seberian von Valancius que hay a bordo de la nave insignia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te das cuenta al instante de que esa es la espada que viste en el retrato de Seberian von Valancius que hay a bordo de la nave insignia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Erkenntnis trifft dich sofort ... das ist das Schwert auf dem Porträt von Seberian von Valancius, das Schwert an Bord des Flaggschiffs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Erkenntnis trifft dich sofort ... das ist das Schwert auf dem Porträt von Seberian von Valancius, das Schwert an Bord des Flaggschiffs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その瞬間、あなたは気づいた。これは、旗艦に乗っているヴァランシウス家の肖像画で見た剣だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The realisation strikes you instantly — that is the sword you saw in the portrait of Seberian von Valancius, the one on board the flagship.{/n}
